claims.rawEmail:
From: andreas.mueller@example.de
Subject: Compensation Claim - Flight EW1178 - 2026-02-28

Dear Lufthansa Customer Relations,

I am writing to formally request compensation under EU Regulation 261/2004
for the disruption I experienced on flight EW1178 on 2026-02-28.

My booking reference is D70NZY. I was scheduled to depart DUS
at 06:50 and arrive at DUS. The flight arrived approximately -155 minutes late at DUS, well beyond the 3-hour threshold for statutory compensation under EU261.

Given the arrival delay exceeded 3 hours, I am entitled to compensation of €600 under Article 7 of EU Regulation 261/2004.

I have attached my boarding pass and booking confirmation for your review.

Yours sincerely,
Andreas Müller

From: andreas.mueller@example.de
Subject: Compensation Claim - Flight LH104 - 2026-02-28

Dear Lufthansa Customer Relations,

I am writing to formally request compensation under EU Regulation 261/2004
for the disruption I experienced on flight LH104 on 2026-02-28.

My booking reference is 3F7IDL. I was scheduled to depart FRA
at 12:15 and arrive at MUC. The flight was cancelled without adequate notice, causing me to miss onward connections and pre-paid arrangements at my destination.

As the flight was cancelled, I am entitled to a full refund or re-routing and statutory compensation under Article 7.

I have attached my boarding pass and booking confirmation for your review.

Yours sincerely,
Andreas Müller
